creator: sem@ciam.ru
text:
I've got the email. It can be useful if somebody get the port.

> Dear Sem,
>
> I maintain Gentoo's ZFS support. The following patch went into our GRUB2
> package to add support for ZFS Feature Flags and LZ4 compression:
>
> http://sources.gentoo.org/cgi-bin/viewvc.cgi/gentoo-x86/sys-boot/grub/files/grub-2.00-zfs-feature-flag-support.patch
>
> bapt told me that you might be interested in it and suggested that I
> email you.
>
> Yours truly,
> Richard Yao
